content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 11:58 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a code review checklist document for Sprint 10 in Markdown format, save to day26/. Include sections for: code quality criteria, security checks, performance considerations, and documentation requirements. Add the review criteria as checkboxes.

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
print(datetime.now(timezone(timedelta(hours=8))).isoformat(timespec='seconds'))
PY

arguments.content:
---
meta:
  created_at: 2026-03-17T23:58:24+08:00
  author: MetaClaw Agent (Orion Tech)
  status: active
  sprint: 10
---

# Sprint 10 — Code Review Checklist

## Code quality criteria

- [ ] Code is readable (clear naming, small functions, minimal nesting)
- [ ] No dead code, debug prints, or commented-out blocks left behind
- [ ] Error handling is consistent and actionable (errors include context)
- [ ] Input validation is present at boundaries (API handlers, CLI args, etc.)
- [ ] Changes are scoped to the PR (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Tests updated/added for new behavior; existing tests still pass
- [ ] Logging is appropriate (no sensitive data; correct level)

## Security checks

- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks are correct for all protected actions
- [ ] User input is validated and sanitized (prevent injection/XSS where applicable)
- [ ] SQL uses parameterized queries (no string interpolation)
- [ ] Secrets are not hardcoded; config uses env/secrets manager
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed for known issues (pin versions; avoid unnecessary packages)
- [ ] File/path operations prevent traversal (normalize and restrict)

## Performance considerations

- [ ] No N+1 query patterns introduced; DB calls are batched where needed
- [ ] Expensive operations are not in hot paths; caching considered when appropriate
- [ ] Pagination/limits enforced for list endpoints
- [ ] Async/concurrency used safely (no blocking I/O on event loop)
- [ ] Timeouts set for outbound HTTP calls; retries are bounded

## Documentation requirements

- [ ] Public APIs (endpoints/functions/classes) have clear docstrings/comments
- [ ] README / runbook updated if behavior, setup, or config changed
- [ ] Config changes documented (new env vars, defaults, migrations)
- [ ] Any breaking change includes upgrade notes

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
print(datetime.now(timezone(timedelta(hours=8))).isoformat(timespec='seconds'))
PY
